microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized agent system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 deployment of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a reusable, scalable model — enabling faster future engagements.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable pattern for continuous validation across non-technical operations teams.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across engineering, operations, and compliance stakeholders.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured agentic orchestration workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, transferring full ownership with written playbooks to embedded team champions.
microsoft_2023: Championed production adoption of **AI-driven code generation workflows**, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly — transferring ownership with documented best-known-methods.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical workflow friction and translating findings into actionable feature requirements for non-technical stakeholders.

Accelerated document intelligence by migrating fragmented documentation into an **AI-powered RAG semantic search pipeline**, enforcing metadata standards that cut lookup time by 83% and served as a reusable ingestion pattern for future deployments.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, embedding with 140+ teams to map high-friction manual workflows to automatable solutions.

Conducted deep workflow discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, translating findings into a prioritized roadmap that targeted critical automation paths and reduced friction for non-technical operations teams.

Engineered a **Power BI integration layer** connecting operational data across 140+ teams into a unified AI-ready dashboard, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and allocate resources to highest-impact workflow interventions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and building a deployment playbook transferred to embedded operations champions.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing reusable integration patterns for future fleet-wide rollouts.

Identified and documented recurring workflow friction across 1,200+ stations, building a structured handoff playbook that enabled non-technical operations staff to **self-serve deployments** without engineering escalation post-engagement.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, embedding a new CRM process that reduced manual handoffs and gave non-technical staff a self-service execution system.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align messaging with high-intent customer segments.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering a structured data playbook that enabled repeatable, evidence-based pricing without analyst support.

tailoring_notes: 'Agentic orchestration' woven into microsoft_ft bullet#5 — mirrors JD's 'agentic orchestration frameworks' qualification directly.
'RAG semantic search pipeline' inserted into microsoft_2023 bullet#3 — mirrors JD's 'RAG systems, document ingestion pipelines' hands-on experience requirement.

'Reusable pattern' / 'deployment playbook transferred to embedded operations champions' language used in microsoft_ft bullet#3 and amazon_robotics bullet#4 — mirrors JD's 'design reusable patterns' and 'identify and train the local AI champion, transfer ownership completely, leave a written playbook' responsibilities.

'Map high-friction manual workflows to automatable solutions' used in microsoft_2022 bullet#1 — directly mirrors JD's 'map their highest-friction workflows to AI-automatable solutions' core responsibility.

'Self-serve deployments' and 'non-technical staff' framing used in amazon_robotics bullet#4 and pro_painters bullet#1 — mirrors JD's repeated emphasis on enabling non-technical users and citizen developer enablement.
